cases.text: The customer asked for a refund after being charged twice.
cases.text_pair: A customer requested a refund because they were billed two times.

cases.text: The order arrived three days earlier than expected.
cases.text_pair: The package was delivered a week late.

cases.text: I cannot sign in because my password reset link expired.
cases.text_pair: My password reset email expired before I could use it, so I still cannot log in.

cases.text: The dashboard now supports exporting monthly CSV reports.
cases.text_pair: The mobile app added dark mode for profile settings.

cases.text: Support resolved the ticket in less than an hour.
cases.text_pair: The support team fixed the issue within sixty minutes.

cases.text: The headphones broke after two weeks of use.
cases.text_pair: The store replaced the headphones with a new pair at no charge.

cases.text: The setup guide was clear and easy to follow.
cases.text_pair: It was easy to follow the installation guide because the instructions were clear.

cases.text: The annual plan costs less than paying month to month.
cases.text_pair: Customer support is now available twenty four hours a day.

cases.text: The team moved the release meeting to Thursday afternoon.
cases.text_pair: The release meeting was rescheduled for Thursday later in the day.

cases.text: The API returned errors for fifteen minutes during the outage.
cases.text_pair: Engineers deployed a new metrics dashboard after the outage ended.
